issues.description: ReturnToHand target should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but must respect 'active' status; current scope is correct but card text says 'active Character' — scope needs qualifier for active state

Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and ReturnToHand with maxCost:4 has no basis in card text. Card only describes two sequential actions within a single Counter trigger, not a separate Trigger effect. This entire effect array entry is spurious.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct for Counter card effects (power boost during battle), but verify this matches OPTCG standard. If correct, this is acceptable.
